data.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Signals Potential Halt to Defensive Actions
data.description: On April 8, Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi announced that Iran's powerful armed forces would cease defensive actions if attacks on the country are halted. According to BlockBeats, Araghchi stated that, in coordination with the Iranian armed forces and considering technical limitations, safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz could be ensured within the next two weeks.

data.title: Iran and U.S. to Discuss Political Confirmation of Battlefield Outcomes
data.description:
Iran announced on April 8 that negotiations with the United States will take place in Islamabad to finalize specific details. According to BlockBeats, the aim is to politically confirm Iran's battlefield achievements within 15 days.

Iranian media reported that Iran's ten-point proposal includes controlling passage through the Strait of Hormuz in coordination with Iranian armed forces, halting wars against Iran and its allies, and the withdrawal of U.S. military forces from all regional bases.

The media also noted that negotiations with the United States do not signify the end of the war. The conclusion of the conflict will only be accepted once all details are finalized according to the ten-point plan.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on Nets vs. Bucks NBA Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the outcome of the NBA regular season game between the Brooklyn Nets and the Milwaukee Bucks. According to Odaily, an account with a history of over $4 million in losses has purchased 240,000 shares predicting a Nets victory over the Bucks at an average price of 46.5 cents.

The game is scheduled to start at 7:30 PM UTC+8. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Nets hold a record of 19 wins and 59 losses, placing them 13th in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Bucks have a record of 31 wins and 47 losses, ranking 11th in the same conference.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 72,000 USDT with a 4.95% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 07, 2026, 23:24 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 72,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 72,037.53125 USDT, with a narrowed 4.95% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Iranian media: Negotiations with the United States do not mean the end of the war.
data.description: Iranian media stated that negotiations with the United States do not signify the end of the war. The war will only end once all details are finalized according to the ten-point plan. The ten-point plan proposed by Iran includes: achieving control over the Strait of Hormuz in coordination with the Iranian armed forces; ceasing the war against Iran and its allies; and the withdrawal of US troops from all regional bases. (Jin Shi)

data.title: U.S. President Trump Accepts Iran's Ceasefire Terms
data.description: On April 8, Iran's national television reported that U.S. President Donald Trump has retreated from his anti-Iran rhetoric. According to BlockBeats, Trump has accepted the ceasefire conditions proposed by Iran.

data.title: In the past hour, a total of $209 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network, with $73.42 million liquidated in Bitcoin alone.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $209 million in positions were liquidated across the entire network in the past hour, with $60.515 million in long positions and $148 million in short positions. Of this, $73.42 million was liquidated in BTC and $41.84 million in ETH. Additionally, $24.78 million in Brent crude oil and $24.18 million in WTI crude oil were liquidated.

data.title: Missiles Launched from Iran Detected by Israeli Military
data.description: The Israeli military has reported the detection of missiles launched from Iran, with the projectiles reportedly heading toward Israel. According to NS3.AI, the military's statement identified Iran as the source of the missile launch.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,200 USDT with a 4.91% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 07, 2026, 22:59 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,200 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,214.209961 USDT, with a narrowed 4.91% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Iran Agrees to Two-Week Ceasefire with Pakistan
data.description: Iran has accepted a two-week ceasefire proposal from Pakistan. According to Odaily, the ceasefire plan has been approved by Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses 2200 USDT Mark with Significant Gains
data.description: Ethereum has surpassed the 2200 USDT mark, according to Odaily. The cryptocurrency is currently trading at 2201.17 USDT, reflecting a 24-hour increase of 4.23%.

data.title: U.S. Federal Funds Futures Rise, Indicating Potential Rate Cut
data.description: On April 8, U.S. federal funds futures experienced a general increase, with the December contract rising by 14 basis points. According to Jin10, this movement suggests a potential rate cut of 17 basis points later this year.

data.title: Trump's Ceasefire Proposal Includes Israel Amid Hormuz Strait Concerns
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump has advanced a ceasefire proposal that includes Israel, according to BlockBeats. The plan stipulates that one of the conditions for the ceasefire is the resumption of navigation through the Hormuz Strait.

Meanwhile, Israel has reported intercepting missile attacks from Iran, indicating that regional conflicts continue to escalate.

The current situation reveals that although there has been some progress in ceasefire negotiations, the primary disagreement remains centered on the passage through the Hormuz Strait, which is a crucial factor affecting the implementation of the ceasefire.

data.title: CME FedWatch Tool Indicates Low Probability of April Rate Hike
data.description: The CME FedWatch Tool reveals a 1.6% probability of a 25 basis point rate hike by the Federal Reserve in April. According to ChainCatcher, there is a 98.4% likelihood that the rates will remain unchanged. By June, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 0%, while the chance of maintaining the current rates is 97.9%. The likelihood of a cumulative 25 basis point rate increase stands at 2.1%.

data.title: White House official: Israel has also agreed to a temporary ceasefire.
data.description: White House officials say Israel has also agreed to a temporary ceasefire. (CNN)

data.title: STOCKS | Nasdaq Futures Rise 2% as Middle East Tensions Ease
data.description: Nasdaq futures have expanded their gains to 2% following a decrease in tensions in the Middle East. According to Jin10, this development has also led to a significant drop in WTI crude oil prices, which have plummeted by 11%, falling below the $100 mark. Meanwhile, gold prices have increased by 1.6%.

data.title: US President Trump: I have agreed to a two-week halt to bombing and attacks on Iran; this will be a two-way ceasefire.
data.description: US President Trump: I have agreed to a two-week halt to bombing and attacks on Iran, which will be a two-way ceasefire. We have made great progress on a final plan for a long-term peace agreement with Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: Pakistan's Prime Minister Proposes Two-Week Plan for U.S.-Iran Talks
data.description: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has proposed a 'two-week plan' to facilitate negotiations between the United States and Iran. According to BlockBeats, a regional source indicated that positive developments are anticipated soon, with the talks being directly led by Pakistan's Army Chief, General Asim Munir. An agreement is expected to be finalized by tonight, local time.

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson Discusses Interest Rate Preparedness
data.description: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Jefferson has stated that the current policy interest rate is well-prepared to address market changes. According to ChainCatcher, Jefferson noted that the rate is approximately in a neutral range.
